chat.title: TERROIR
chat.subtitle: Organisational listening

input.pastePlaceholder: Paste a narrative, interview transcript, or meeting notes...

chat.emptyState: Tell me about the organisation you're working with. Who are they, what do they do, and what are you trying to help them build?

upload.dropzone: Drop files or click to upload
upload.fileTypes: PDF · DOCX · TXT · MD · JSON · max 4 MB

paste.contentPlaceholder: Paste document content here — wiki pages, Confluence exports, meeting notes, interview transcripts...

summary.hint: Click a verdict badge to override · SKIP docs won't be extracted

integration.title: Cross-document integration
integration.description: {count} entities extracted — merge duplicates, connect across documents, correct attractors.
integration.failed: Integration failed — check console for details.

checklist.title: What to upload
checklist.skipContent: Legal boilerplate, cookie policies, T&C, marketing brochures, compliance templates
checklist.item1: Process docs — how work actually gets done, handoffs, workflows
checklist.item2: Org charts & role descriptions — who does what, reporting lines
checklist.item3: Meeting notes & transcripts — where real language lives
checklist.item4: Strategy docs — goals, priorities, decision records

sources.emptyLine1: Upload documents or paste text to extract entities and relationships onto the canvas.
sources.emptyLine2: Files are classified first — legal boilerplate and noise are filtered out automatically.

delta.title: Session Delta
delta.noSnapshots: Run a Sources integration to enable

signals.title: Evaluative Signals
signals.emptyState: No evaluative signals yet. Use the + button to upload documents or paste text, or describe the organisation in Chat to surface what it values and fears.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.setupPrompt: Set up your project to guide AI extraction and enable cross-source synthesis.

node.title: Node
node.label: Label
node.hubNodeDesc: Structural anchor — entities connect to this hub. Rename via the label field above.

scoping.title: Project Scoping
scoping.subtitle: Haiku will ask 4–5 questions to configure your project brief
scoping.readyTitle: Ready to set up your project
scoping.readyDesc: A short conversation will produce a project brief that guides how the AI extracts and synthesises your documents.
scoping.beginMessage: Hello, let's set up this project.

brief.title: Project Brief
brief.discoveryGoalPlaceholder: What are you trying to understand?

domain_objects.label: Domain Objects
domain_objects.description: What exists — teams, tools, systems, roles

interaction_patterns.label: Interaction Patterns
interaction_patterns.description: How work moves — workflows, handoffs, dependencies

projects.title: TERROIR
projects.subtitle: Organisational Listening
projects.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to get started.
